nasb.text: I will establish his kingdom forever if he resolutely performs My commandments and My ordinances, as is done now.’

esv.text: I will establish his kingdom forever if he continues strong in keeping my commandments and my rules, as he is today.’

cnv.text: 如果他堅心遵行我的誡命和典章，像今日一樣，我必堅立他的國，直到永遠。’

ccb.text: 倘若他像今天一样继续坚守我的诫命和典章，我必使他的国度永远稳固。’
